node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"իւ<lb xml:id=\"l104247174\" facs=\"#z104247174\" n=\"7\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րաքանչիւր","line":{"facs":"#z104247173","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104247173","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-097a"},"n":"իւրաքանչիւր"},"M36":{"lit":"իւրաքանչիւր","context":"text/body/ab[95]","n":"իւրաքանչիւր"},"M3078":{"lit":"իւր<lb xml:id=\"l103982887\" facs=\"#z103982887\" n=\"10\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>աքանչիւր","line":{"facs":"#z103982886","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103982886","n":"9"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3078-084a"},"n":"իւրաքանչիւր"}}
